resources.string: I am the independent developer behind YummyTV. I work on the app in my free time because I want to make watching anime more convenient and enjoyable.
Why is the app like this?
YummyTV reflects my idea of a convenient anime streaming app. It evolves gradually: I try ideas, see how they work in real use, and improve them over time.
Why can’t I cover every case?
A single developer has limited time and access to devices. I cannot test every Android version, device model, video source, network, and user scenario in advance.

The app depends on more than its own code. External APIs, players, source availability, network restrictions, and device-specific behavior can all change or occasionally work differently than expected.

Your messages help me discover scenarios and errors that I cannot reproduce myself. The more precise the report, the easier it is to understand the cause and prioritize improvements that really matter.
